LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING WHICH WAS NOT CONTESTED. PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE COURT SIGNED THE PROPOSED ORDER AND PROPOSED JUDGMENT SUBMITTED WITH THE MOVING PAPERS, LEAVING BLANK THE AMOUNT OF COSTS. MOVING PARTY MUST FILE AND SERVE A MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AFTER THE ORDER IS ENTERED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MARCH 15, 2013 TO GIVE DISCOVER BANK THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. DISCOVER BANK MUST IMMEDIATELY DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF ITS MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-09-2013 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-06-2013 Continued To Apr-24-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-15-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is Granted. No opposition filed. The Court signed the proposed order and proposed judgment submitted with the moving papers, leaving blank the amount of costs. Moving party must file and serve a memorandum of costs after the order is entered. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Feb-07-2013 Continued To Mar-15-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: THE COURt adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS Continued on the court's own motion to March 15, 2013 to give Discover Bank the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Discover Bank must immediately deliver courtesy copies of its moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, or the motion will be denied. Judge: Marla Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
